abilities.description: Launches a cask of paralyzing powder that ricochets between enemy units, stunning and damaging those it hits. Each bounce deals more damage than the previous one. Deals 0.8 damage to creeps.
abilities.name: Paralyzing Cask
abilities.story: The Witch Doctor recycles the bones of fallen friends and foes, using the powder as part of his arsenal of charms and alchemy.

abilities.description: Witch Doctor focuses his magic to heal nearby allied units, costing Witch Doctor mana every second Voodoo Restoration is active.
params: [picture:talent_tree_symbol] Max Health as Heal per Second: 2%
abilities.name: Voodoo Restoration
abilities.story: Zharvakko's hocus pocus is not limited only hexxing his opponents and is quite adept at curing ailments.

abilities.description: Curses all enemy Heroes in a small area, causing them to take a set amount of damage each second, as well as bursts of damage every 4 seconds based on how much health they have lost since the curse began.
abilities.name: Maledict
abilities.story: Certain voodoo magics can make an enemy regret engaging the Witch Doctor.

abilities.description: Turns Witch Doctor into a Death Ward briefly with reduced attack speed. He is hidden during this time.
abilities.name: Voodoo Switcheroo

abilities.description: Summons a deadly ward to attack enemy heroes within its attack range. Lasts a maximum of 8 seconds. Death Ward has 50% bonus accuracy.
abilities.name: Death Ward
abilities.story: Witch Doctor performs a ritualistic dance, one that haunts the dreams of those who live to recount it.

description: Channels a high damage death ward. A bizarre figure shambles across the land, searching for any opportunity to apply the morbid arts of Prefectura Island. Filling a skull with noxious powder, the Witch Doctor throws this Paralyzing Cask to stun enemies in succession. To his allies, Zharvakko is a fountain of health, curing ailments with Voodoo Restoration. To his foes, he is the source of curses and Switcheroos. Notoriously known for Maledicting his adversaries and forcing them to relive the agony they will inevitably receive from his Death Ward, few can match Witch Doctor's versatility.  Support Nuker Disabler  BadTeeth, Potbelly, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Witch Doctor is sometimes called "The Walking Fountain", referring to his support abilities Voodoo Restoration and Death Ward.
